<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en-AU">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">

<!-- ============================================================
     SEO  (per-tenant tokens: title / description / canonical)
     ============================================================ -->
<title>{{pageTitle}}</title>
<meta name="description" content="{{pageDesc}}">
<link rel="canonical" href="https://{{domain}}/">
<meta name="robots" content="index,follow">

<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:title" content="{{pageTitle}}">
<meta property="og:description" content="{{pageDesc}}">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://{{domain}}/">
<meta property="og:locale" content="en_AU">

<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@600;700;800&family=Barlow:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<!-- Structured data — Plumber (drives the local pack) + FAQ -->
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context":"https://schema.org",
  "@type":"Plumber",
  "name":"{{businessName}}",
  "image":"https://{{domain}}/og.jpg",
  "url":"https://{{domain}}/",
  "telephone":"{{phone}}",
  "priceRange":"$$",
  "areaServed":"Canberra & the ACT",
  "openingHoursSpecification":{"@type":"OpeningHoursSpecification","dayOfWeek":["Monday","Tuesday","Wednesday","Thursday","Friday","Saturday","Sunday"],"opens":"00:00","closes":"23:59"},
  "address":{"@type":"PostalAddress","addressLocality":"Canberra","addressRegion":"ACT","addressCountry":"AU"},
  "geo":{"@type":"GeoCoordinates","latitude":-35.2809,"longitude":149.1300},
  "aggregateRating":{"@type":"AggregateRating","ratingValue":"4.9","reviewCount":"212"}
}
</script>
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"FAQPage",
  "mainEntity":[
    {"@type":"Question","name":"Do you offer same-day service?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Yes. For blocked drains, burst pipes and no-hot-water jobs we aim to be on site the same day, and we run a 24/7 line for genuine emergencies."}},
    {"@type":"Question","name":"Will I know the price before you start?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Always. We quote a fixed price up front before any work begins, so there are no surprises when the job is done."}},
    {"@type":"Question","name":"Are you licensed and insured?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Yes — fully licensed ACT plumbers and fully insured. Your licence and insurance details are on every invoice."}}
  ]
}
</script>

<style>
/* ============================================================
   DESIGN TOKENS — "charcoal & hi-vis" trade theme
   ============================================================ */
:root{
  --steel-950:#141a24;   /* darkest */
  --steel-900:#1a2230;   /* hero / header bg */
  --steel-800:#243142;   /* cards on dark */
  --pipe:#1f7bb8;        /* water / steel blue */
  --pipe-deep:#155d8c;--pipe-glow:#3a8fce;
  --hivis:#ff6a1f;       /* urgent CTA orange */
  --hivis-600:#e85c14;
  --safety:#ffc400;      /* sparing yellow accent */
  --light:#eef2f6;       /* page bg */
  --ink:#1a2230;
  --muted:#5b6878;
  --line:#dde4ec;
  --white:#fff;
  --radius:12px;
  --maxw:1440px;
  --shadow:0 10px 34px rgba(20,26,36,.14);
}
*{box-sizing:border-box}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{margin:0;background:var(--light);color:var(--ink);
  font-family:"Barlow",system-ui,sans-serif;font-size:17px;line-height:1.55;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased}
h1,h2,h3,.display{font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;font-weight:800;line-height:.98;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.01em;margin:0}
p{margin:0}
a{color:inherit}
.wrap{max-width:var(--maxw);margin:0 auto;padding:0 22px}
.eyebrow{font-family:"Barlow";font-weight:700;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--pipe)}

.btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:.5em;border:0;cursor:pointer;
  font-family:"Barlow Condensed";font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.03em;
  font-size:19px;border-radius:10px;padding:15px 26px;text-decoration:none;transition:.15s}
.btn:active{transform:translateY(1px)}
.btn-call{background:var(--hivis);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(255,106,31,.35)}
.btn-call:hover{background:var(--hivis-600)}
.btn-quote{background:var(--white);color:var(--ink);border:2px solid var(--line)}
.btn-quote:hover{border-color:var(--pipe)}
.btn-pipe{background:var(--pipe);color:#fff}
.btn-pipe:hover{background:var(--pipe-deep)}

/* emergency strip */
.emerg{background:var(--hivis);color:#fff;text-align:center;font-family:"Barlow";font-weight:700;
  font-size:14.5px;padding:9px 16px;letter-spacing:.01em}
.emerg a{text-decoration:none;border-bottom:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.6)}

/* header */
header.site{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:60;background:var(--steel-900);color:#fff}
.bar{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;height:70px}
.brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px;text-decoration:none;color:#fff}
.brand .mark{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:9px;background:var(--pipe);display:grid;place-items:center;flex:none;
  font-family:"Barlow Condensed";font-weight:800;font-size:22px;color:#fff}
.brand .nm{font-family:"Barlow Condensed";font-weight:800;font-size:24px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.02em;line-height:.9}
.brand .nm small{display:block;font-family:"Barlow";font-weight:600;font-size:10.5px;letter-spacing:.18em;color:var(--safety);text-transform:uppercase}
.head-call{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px}
.head-phone{text-align:right;line-height:1.05}
.head-phone small{display:block;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#9fb0c2;font-weight:600}
.head-phone b{font-family:"Barlow Condensed";font-weight:800;font-size:23px;color:#fff;text-decoration:none}
@media(max-width:680px){.head-phone{display:none}}

/* hero */
.hero{background:
  linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(20,26,36,.0),rgba(20,26,36,.55)),
  radial-gradient(120% 120% at 80% 0%, var(--pipe-glow) 0%, var(--steel-900) 55%, var(--steel-950) 100%);
  color:#fff;padding:64px 0 70px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.hero::after{content:none}
.hero .eyebrow{color:var(--safety)}
.hero h1{font-size:clamp(44px,7vw,84px);margin-top:12px;max-width:16ch}
.hero h1 .hl{color:var(--hivis)}
.hero-sub{margin-top:20px;font-size:20px;color:#cdd8e3;max-width:48ch;font-weight:500}
.hero-cta{margin-top:30px;display:flex;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.badges{margin-top:34px;display:flex;gap:10px 26px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.badge{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;font-weight:600;font-size:14.5px;color:#dde6ee}
.badge .b-ic{width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(31,123,184,.22);color:var(--safety);
  display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:15px;flex:none}
/* response device */
.resp{position:absolute;top:60px;right:max(22px,calc((100vw - var(--maxw))/2 + 22px));
  background:var(--steel-800);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:16px;padding:20px 22px;text-align:center;box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
.resp .pulse{width:11px;height:11px;border-radius:50%;background:#39d98a;margin:0 auto 10px;
  box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(57,217,138,.6);animation:pulse 2s infinite}
@keyframes pulse{0%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(57,217,138,.55)}70%{box-shadow:0 0 0 12px rgba(57,217,138,0)}100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(57,217,138,0)}}
.resp .big{font-family:"Barlow Condensed";font-weight:800;font-size:40px;color:#fff;line-height:1}
.resp .lbl{font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#9fb0c2;font-weight:600;margin-top:4px}
@media(max-width:1040px){.resp{display:none}}

/* sections */
.section{padding:66px 0}
.section-head{max-width:62ch}
.section-head h2{font-size:clamp(32px,4.4vw,52px);margin-top:10px}
.section-head p{margin-top:13px;color:var(--muted);font-size:18px;font-weight:500}

/* services */
.svcs{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:16px;margin-top:40px}
.svc{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:24px;
  transition:.15s;position:relative}
.svc:hover{border-color:var(--pipe);transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
.svc .ic{width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:12px;background:linear-gradient(140deg,var(--pipe),var(--pipe-deep));color:#fff;box-shadow:0 8px 18px -8px var(--pipe);text-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.28);
  display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:22px;margin-bottom:15px}
.svc h3{font-size:24px}
.svc p{margin-top:8px;color:var(--muted);font-size:15.5px;font-weight:500}
@media(max-width:860px){.svcs{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}}
@media(max-width:560px){.svcs{grid-template-columns:1fr}}

/* why band */
.why{background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--steel-950),var(--steel-900));color:#fff;border-top:4px solid var(--pipe)}
.why .wrap{padding:62px 22px}
.why h2{font-size:clamp(30px,4vw,46px)}
.why-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:22px;margin-top:38px}
.why-item .n{font-family:"Barlow Condensed";font-weight:800;font-size:46px;color:var(--hivis);line-height:1}
.why-item h3{font-size:21px;margin-top:8px}
.why-item p{margin-top:7px;color:#bcc8d4;font-size:15px;font-weight:500}
@media(max-width:860px){.why-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:28px}}

/* area */
.area-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:44px;align-items:center}
.suburbs{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:9px;margin-top:22px}
.suburbs span{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:999px;padding:7px 15px;font-size:14.5px;font-weight:600;color:#3a4756}
@media(max-width:760px){.area-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:24px}}

/* reviews */
.reviews{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:16px;margin-top:40px}
.review{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:24px}
.review .stars{color:var(--safety);letter-spacing:2px;font-size:16px}
.review p{margin-top:12px;font-size:15.5px;font-weight:500;color:#33414f}
.review .who{margin-top:14px;font-weight:700;font-size:14.5px}
.review .who span{color:var(--muted);font-weight:500}
@media(max-width:860px){.reviews{grid-template-columns:1fr}}

/* quote form */
.quote{background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--steel-900),var(--steel-950));color:#fff}
.quote .wrap{padding:64px 22px}
.quote-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1.02fr;gap:48px;align-items:start}
.quote h2{font-size:clamp(32px,4.4vw,52px)}
.quote .lead-sub{margin-top:16px;color:#cdd8e3;font-size:18px;font-weight:500;max-width:42ch}
.q-points{margin-top:26px;display:grid;gap:13px;padding:0}
.q-points li{list-style:none;display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:center;font-weight:600;color:#e4ebf2}
.q-points .t{width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:7px;background:var(--hivis);display:grid;place-items:center;flex:none;font-size:13px;color:#fff}
.qcard{background:var(--white);border-radius:16px;padding:28px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);color:var(--ink)}
.qcard h3{font-size:26px;color:var(--ink)}
.ff{margin-bottom:13px}.ff label{display:block;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:5px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em;color:#46535f}
.ff input,.ff select,.ff textarea{width:100%;padding:13px 14px;border:2px solid var(--line);border-radius:9px;font-family:"Barlow";font-size:16px;color:var(--ink)}
.ff textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:74px}
.ff input:focus,.ff select:focus,.ff textarea:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--pipe);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(31,123,184,.16)}
.form-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:13px}
.qcard .btn{width:100%;margin-top:6px}
.q-fine{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--muted);text-align:center;margin-top:12px}
.q-success{display:none;text-align:center;padding:26px 6px}
.q-success.show{display:block}
.q-success .big{font-family:"Barlow Condensed";font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:30px;color:var(--pipe)}
@media(max-width:820px){.quote-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:28px}.form-row{grid-template-columns:1fr}}

/* faq */
.faq{max-width:760px;margin:36px auto 0}
.faq details{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:10px;padding:16px 20px;margin-bottom:11px}
.faq summary{cursor:pointer;font-family:"Barlow Condensed";font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:21px;list-style:none;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px;align-items:center}
.faq summary::-webkit-details-marker{display:none}
.faq summary::after{content:"+";color:var(--hivis);font-family:"Barlow";font-size:26px;line-height:1}
.faq details[open] summary::after{content:"–"}
.faq p{margin-top:11px;color:#46535f;font-weight:500;font-size:16px}

/* footer */
footer.site{background:var(--steel-950);color:#9fb0c2;padding:52px 0 110px;font-size:14.5px}
.foot-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr;gap:32px}
footer .brand{margin-bottom:14px}
footer h4{color:#fff;font-family:"Barlow Condensed";font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:17px;letter-spacing:.04em;margin:0 0 12px}
footer a{display:block;text-decoration:none;margin-bottom:8px;color:#9fb0c2}
footer a:hover{color:#fff}
.foot-legal{margin-top:34px;padding-top:20px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);font-size:12.5px;color:#6b7986;line-height:1.7}
@media(max-width:760px){.foot-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:24px}}

/* sticky mobile call bar */
.mobile-call{position:fixed;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;z-index:70;display:none;
  background:var(--hivis);box-shadow:0 -6px 20px rgba(20,26,36,.25)}
.mobile-call a{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:10px;color:#fff;text-decoration:none;
  font-family:"Barlow Condensed";font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:21px;padding:15px;letter-spacing:.02em}
@media(max-width:680px){.mobile-call{display:block}}
.mc-row{display:flex;align-items:stretch}
.mc-btn{flex:1 1 0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;color:#fff;text-decoration:none;font-family:"Barlow Condensed";font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:15px;letter-spacing:.02em;padding:13px 6px;border:0;background:transparent;cursor:pointer;min-width:0}
.mc-btn .lp-ic{width:22px;height:22px;flex:0 0 auto}
.mc-btn span{white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.mc-btn+.mc-btn{border-left:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18)}
.mobile-call.lab-under .mc-btn{flex-direction:column;gap:4px;font-size:11px;padding:9px 4px}
.mobile-call.lab-icon .mc-btn span{display:none}
.mobile-call.lab-icon .mc-btn{gap:0}

:focus-visible{outline:3px solid var(--safety);outline-offset:2px;border-radius:5px}
@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){*{scroll-behavior:auto!important;transition:none!important;animation:none!important}}

/* Quote First layout (id: quote-first) — reorder sections inside <main> only; classic unaffected */
html.layout-quote-first main#top{display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
html.layout-quote-first main#top>[data-sec="hero"]{order:1;}
html.layout-quote-first main#top>[data-sec="trustBar"]{order:1;}
html.layout-quote-first main#top>[data-sec="promotions-hero"]{order:1;}
html.layout-quote-first main#top>[data-sec="quote"]{order:2;}
html.layout-quote-first main#top>[data-sec="services"]{order:3;}
html.layout-quote-first main#top>[data-sec="serviceProcess"]{order:3;}
html.layout-quote-first main#top>[data-sec="why"]{order:4;}
html.layout-quote-first main#top>[data-sec="crew"]{order:4;}
html.layout-quote-first main#top>[data-sec="reviews"]{order:5;}
html.layout-quote-first main#top>[data-sec="promotions-inline"]{order:5;}
html.layout-quote-first main#top>[data-sec="area"]{order:6;}
html.layout-quote-first main#top>[data-sec="faq"]{order:7;}

/* Photo Proof layout (id: photo-proof) — reorder + reveal beforeAfter; classic & quote-first unaffected */
section[data-sec="beforeAfter"]{display:none}
html.layout-photo-proof section[data-sec="beforeAfter"]{display:block}
html.layout-photo-proof main#top{display:flex;flex-direction:column}
html.layout-photo-proof main#top>[data-sec="hero"]{order:1}
html.layout-photo-proof main#top>[data-sec="trustBar"]{order:1}
html.layout-photo-proof main#top>[data-sec="promotions-hero"]{order:1}
html.layout-photo-proof main#top>[data-sec="services"]{order:2}
html.layout-photo-proof main#top>[data-sec="serviceProcess"]{order:2}
html.layout-photo-proof main#top>[data-sec="beforeAfter"]{order:3}
html.layout-photo-proof main#top>[data-sec="reviews"]{order:4}
html.layout-photo-proof main#top>[data-sec="promotions-inline"]{order:4}
html.layout-photo-proof main#top>[data-sec="why"]{order:5}
html.layout-photo-proof main#top>[data-sec="crew"]{order:5}
html.layout-photo-proof main#top>[data-sec="area"]{order:6}
html.layout-photo-proof main#top>[data-sec="quote"]{order:7}
html.layout-photo-proof main#top>[data-sec="faq"]{order:8}
/* Before & After cards */
.ba-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(300px,1fr));gap:24px;margin-top:30px}
.ba-card{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line,#e7e7e7);border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(20,30,45,.07)}
.ba-pair{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:2px;background:var(--steel-900,#1a2230)}
.ba-shot{position:relative;aspect-ratio:4/3;overflow:hidden}
.ba-img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block}
.ba-ph{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f1f3f6,#e3e7ee);color:#7c8694;font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;font-size:15px;text-align:center;padding:10px}
.ba-shot[data-tag]::after{content:attr(data-tag);position:absolute;top:10px;left:10px;background:rgba(20,30,45,.82);color:#fff;font-family:"Barlow",sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:4px 9px;border-radius:999px}
.ba-cap{padding:16px 18px 18px}
.ba-cap h3{font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:22px;line-height:1;margin:0 0 6px;color:var(--ink,#1a2230)}
.ba-cap p{color:#55606e;font-size:15px;margin:0}

/* Emergency Response layout (id: emergency-response) — reorder + reveal responseCards; other layouts unaffected */
section[data-sec="responseCards"]{display:none}
html.layout-emergency-response section[data-sec="responseCards"]{display:block}
html.layout-emergency-response main#top{display:flex;flex-direction:column}
html.layout-emergency-response main#top>[data-sec="hero"]{order:1}
html.layout-emergency-response main#top>[data-sec="trustBar"]{order:1}
html.layout-emergency-response main#top>[data-sec="promotions-hero"]{order:1}
html.layout-emergency-response main#top>[data-sec="responseCards"]{order:2}
html.layout-emergency-response main#top>[data-sec="quote"]{order:3}
html.layout-emergency-response main#top>[data-sec="services"]{order:4}
html.layout-emergency-response main#top>[data-sec="serviceProcess"]{order:4}
html.layout-emergency-response main#top>[data-sec="reviews"]{order:5}
html.layout-emergency-response main#top>[data-sec="promotions-inline"]{order:5}
html.layout-emergency-response main#top>[data-sec="why"]{order:6}
html.layout-emergency-response main#top>[data-sec="crew"]{order:6}
html.layout-emergency-response main#top>[data-sec="faq"]{order:7}
html.layout-emergency-response main#top>[data-sec="area"]{order:8}
/* Response cards */
.rcards{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(230px,1fr));gap:18px;margin-top:30px}
.rcard{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:flex-start;background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line,#e7e7e7);border-left:4px solid var(--hivis,#ff6a1f);border-radius:14px;padding:18px 20px;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(20,30,45,.06)}
.rc-ic{flex:0 0 auto;width:46px;height:46px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border-radius:12px;background:linear-gradient(140deg,var(--hivis,#ff6a1f),var(--hivis-600,#e25a18));color:#fff;font-size:22px;font-weight:800}
.rc-tx h3{font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:20px;line-height:1;margin:0 0 4px;color:var(--ink,#1a2230)}
.rc-tx p{color:#55606e;font-size:14px;margin:0}

/* Authority Builder layout (id: authority-builder) — reorder + reveal projectStats; other layouts unaffected */
section[data-sec="projectStats"]{display:none}
html.layout-authority-builder section[data-sec="projectStats"]{display:block}
html.layout-authority-builder main#top{display:flex;flex-direction:column}
html.layout-authority-builder main#top>[data-sec="hero"]{order:1}
html.layout-authority-builder main#top>[data-sec="trustBar"]{order:1}
html.layout-authority-builder main#top>[data-sec="promotions-hero"]{order:1}
html.layout-authority-builder main#top>[data-sec="projectStats"]{order:2}
html.layout-authority-builder main#top>[data-sec="services"]{order:3}
html.layout-authority-builder main#top>[data-sec="serviceProcess"]{order:3}
html.layout-authority-builder main#top>[data-sec="why"]{order:4}

html.layout-social-proof-feed main#top>[data-sec="splitHero"]{order:1}
html.layout-social-proof-feed main#top>[data-sec="trustBar"]{order:2}
html.layout-social-proof-feed main#top>[data-sec="promotions-hero"]{order:2}
html.layout-social-proof-feed main#top>[data-sec="activityCounter"]{order:3}
html.layout-social-proof-feed main#top>[data-sec="activityTimeline"]{order:4}
html.layout-social-proof-feed main#top>[data-sec="proofStream"]{order:5}
html.layout-social-proof-feed main#top>[data-sec="projectFeed"]{order:6}
html.layout-social-proof-feed main#top>[data-sec="jobsFeed"]{order:7}
html.layout-social-proof-feed main#top>[data-sec="beforeAfterFeed"]{order:8}
html.layout-social-proof-feed main#top>[data-sec="videoReels"]{order:9}
html.layout-social-proof-feed main#top>[data-sec="services"]{order:10}
html.layout-social-proof-feed main#top>[data-sec="serviceProcess"]{order:10}
html.layout-social-proof-feed main#top>[data-sec="reviews"]{order:11}
html.layout-social-proof-feed main#top>[data-sec="promotions-inline"]{order:11}
html.layout-social-proof-feed main#top>[data-sec="customerReactions"]{order:12}
html.layout-social-proof-feed main#top>[data-sec="why"]{order:13}
html.layout-social-proof-feed main#top>[data-sec="crew"]{order:13}
html.layout-social-proof-feed main#top>[data-sec="area"]{order:15}
html.layout-social-proof-feed main#top>[data-sec="quote"]{order:16}
html.layout-social-proof-feed main#top>[data-sec="faq"]{order:17}
/* Proof Stream feed (masonry) */
.ps-feed{columns:320px 3;column-gap:22px;margin-top:30px}
.ps-card{break-inside:avoid;-webkit-column-break-inside:avoid;margin:0 0 22px;background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line,#e7e7e7);border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(20,30,45,.07)}
.ps-media{position:relative;display:block;aspect-ratio:4/3;overflow:hidden;background:var(--steel-900,#1a2230)}
.ps-img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block}
.ps-ph{width:100%;height:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f1f3f6,#e3e7ee);color:#7c8694;font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;font-size:14px}
.ps-play{position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);width:58px;height:58px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.92);color:var(--steel-900,#1a2230);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:22px;box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.3)}
.ps-barow{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:2px;background:var(--steel-900,#1a2230)}
.ps-bahalf{position:relative;aspect-ratio:1/1;overflow:hidden}
.ps-bahalf>span{position:absolute;top:8px;left:8px;background:rgba(20,30,45,.78);color:#fff;font-family:"Barlow",sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:999px}
.ps-body{padding:16px 18px 18px}
.ps-pill{display:inline-block;font-family:"Barlow",sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--pipe,#1f7bb8);background:color-mix(in srgb,var(--pipe,#1f7bb8) 12%,#fff);padding:4px 10px;border-radius:999px;margin-bottom:10px}
.ps-stars{color:var(--safety,#ffc400);font-size:18px;letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:8px}
.ps-title{font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:21px;line-height:1.02;margin:0;color:var(--ink,#1a2230)}
.ps-quote{font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:20px;line-height:1.12;color:var(--ink,#1a2230);margin:0}
.ps-meta{font-family:"Barlow",sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.05em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#8a93a0;margin:8px 0 0}
.ps-text{color:#55606e;font-size:15px;margin:10px 0 0}
.ps-cta{display:inline-flex;margin-top:14px}
.ps-cta .btn{font-size:15px;padding:11px 18px}
@media(max-width:560px){.ps-feed{columns:1}}

/* Social Proof Feed — Phase 2: Split Hero + Activity Counter (reveal only in this layout) */
section[data-sec="splitHero"],section[data-sec="activityCounter"]{display:none}
html.layout-social-proof-feed section[data-sec="splitHero"]{display:block}
html.layout-social-proof-feed section[data-sec="activityCounter"]{display:block}
/* Split hero */
.sph{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.1fr .9fr;gap:40px;align-items:center}
.sph-h{font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:clamp(36px,5vw,60px);line-height:.98;margin:10px 0 0;color:var(--ink,#1a2230)}
.sph-h .hl{color:var(--hivis,#ff6a1f)}
.sph-sub{color:#55606e;font-size:clamp(16px,2vw,19px);margin:16px 0 0;max-width:48ch}
.sph-cta{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;margin-top:24px}
.sph-right{background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--steel-950,#10161f),var(--steel-900,#1a2230));border-radius:18px;padding:22px;box-shadow:0 18px 50px rgba(20,30,45,.18)}
.sph-wall-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;color:#fff;font-family:"Barlow",sans-serif;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:14px}
.sph-live{width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;background:#34d17a;box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(52,209,122,.6);animation:sphPulse 1.8s infinite}
@keyframes sphPulse{0%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(52,209,122,.55)}70%{box-shadow:0 0 0 9px rgba(52,209,122,0)}100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(52,209,122,0)}}
.sph-note{display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.09);border-radius:12px;padding:13px 15px;margin-bottom:10px;opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px);animation:sphIn .5s ease forwards}
@keyframes sphIn{to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
.sph-tick{flex:0 0 auto;width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;background:#34d17a;color:#06231a;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:800;font-size:13px}
.sph-note-t{color:#fff;font-weight:700;font-size:15px;line-height:1.2}
.sph-note-time{color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;margin-top:3px}
@media(max-width:820px){.sph{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:26px}}
/* Activity counter */
section[data-sec="activityCounter"]{border-top:1px solid var(--line,#e7e7e7);border-bottom:1px solid var(--line,#e7e7e7);background:#fff}
.ac-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(180px,1fr));gap:10px;margin-top:26px}
.ac-stat{text-align:center;padding:14px}
.ac-stat+.ac-stat{box-shadow:inset 1px 0 0 var(--line,#e7e7e7)}
.ac-value{font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;font-weight:800;line-height:.9;font-size:clamp(46px,7vw,76px);color:var(--pipe,#1f7bb8)}
.ac-label{font-family:"Barlow",sans-serif;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;font-size:13px;color:#55606e;margin-top:10px}
@media(max-width:560px){.ac-stat+.ac-stat{box-shadow:none}}

/* Team Members (reusable) */
.crew-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(200px,1fr));gap:22px;margin-top:30px}
.crew-card{text-align:center;background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line,#e7e7e7);border-radius:16px;padding:28px 20px;box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(20,30,45,.06)}
.crew-photo{width:112px;height:112px;border-radius:50%;margin:0 auto 16px;object-fit:cover;display:block;background:var(--steel-900,#1a2230)}
.crew-avatar{width:112px;height:112px;border-radius:50%;margin:0 auto 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:linear-gradient(140deg,var(--pipe,#1f7bb8),var(--pipe-deep,#155a87));color:#fff;font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:46px;line-height:1}
.crew-name{font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:25px;line-height:1;margin:0;color:var(--ink,#1a2230)}
.crew-role{color:var(--ink,#1a2230);font-weight:700;font-size:15px;margin:7px 0 0}
.crew-detail{color:#8a93a0;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;margin:3px 0 0}

/* Social Proof Feed \u2014 Jobs Feed + Before/After Feed */
section[data-sec="jobsFeed"],section[data-sec="beforeAfterFeed"]{display:none}
html.layout-social-proof-feed section[data-sec="jobsFeed"]{display:block}
html.layout-social-proof-feed section[data-sec="beforeAfterFeed"]{display:block}
/* Jobs feed (Pinterest/IG-style photo cards) */
.jf-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(260px,1fr));gap:22px;margin-top:30px}
.jf-card{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line,#e7e7e7);border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(20,30,45,.07);transition:transform .16s,box-shadow .16s}
.jf-card:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 18px 44px rgba(20,30,45,.13)}
.jf-shot{position:relative;aspect-ratio:4/3;overflow:hidden;background:var(--steel-900,#1a2230)}
.jf-img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block}
.jf-ph{width:100%;height:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f1f3f6,#e3e7ee);color:#7c8694;font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;font-size:15px}
.jf-body{padding:16px 18px 18px}
.jf-title{font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:22px;line-height:1;margin:0;color:var(--ink,#1a2230)}
.jf-meta{font-family:"Barlow",sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.05em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#8a93a0;margin:7px 0 0}
.jf-result{color:#55606e;font-size:15px;margin:10px 0 0}
/* Before/After feed (social-feed cards) */
.baf-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(330px,1fr));gap:24px;margin-top:30px}
.baf-card{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line,#e7e7e7);border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(20,30,45,.07)}
.baf-pair{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:2px;background:var(--steel-900,#1a2230)}
.baf-shot{position:relative;aspect-ratio:4/3;overflow:hidden}
.baf-img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block}
.baf-ph{width:100%;height:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f1f3f6,#e3e7ee);color:#7c8694;font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;font-size:13px}
.baf-shot>span{position:absolute;top:10px;left:10px;background:rgba(20,30,45,.8);color:#fff;font-family:"Barlow",sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:999px}
.baf-body{padding:16px 18px 18px}
.baf-title{font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:22px;line-height:1;margin:0;color:var(--ink,#1a2230)}
.baf-meta{font-family:"Barlow",sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.05em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#8a93a0;margin:7px 0 0}
.baf-cap{color:#55606e;font-size:15px;margin:10px 0 0}

/* Social Proof Feed \u2014 Video Reels */
section[data-sec="videoReels"]{display:none}
html.layout-social-proof-feed section[data-sec="videoReels"]{display:block}
.vr-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(210px,1fr));gap:22px;margin-top:30px}
.vr-card{position:relative;display:block;aspect-ratio:9/16;border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden;background:var(--steel-900,#1a2230);box-shadow:0 12px 34px rgba(20,30,45,.18);text-decoration:none;transition:transform .16s,box-shadow .16s}
a.vr-card:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 22px 50px rgba(20,30,45,.28)}
.vr-img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block}
.vr-ph{width:100%;height:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:linear-gradient(150deg,var(--steel-800,#222c3d),var(--steel-950,#0e131c));color:#aeb8c6;font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;font-size:14px}
.vr-ov{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(10,14,20,.78) 0%,rgba(10,14,20,.05) 42%,rgba(10,14,20,0) 70%)}
.vr-play{position:absolute;left:50%;top:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);width:58px;height:58px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.94);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(0,0,0,.35);transition:transform .16s}
.vr-card:hover .vr-play{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1.09)}
.vr-play::after{content:"";border-style:solid;border-width:11px 0 11px 18px;border-color:transparent transparent transparent var(--pipe-deep,#155a87);margin-left:5px}
.vr-tag{position:absolute;top:12px;left:12px;background:rgba(10,14,20,.72);color:#fff;font-family:"Barlow",sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:999px;backdrop-filter:blur(4px)}
.vr-cap{position:absolute;left:14px;right:14px;bottom:14px;color:#fff;font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:18px;line-height:1.05;text-shadow:0 1px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.5)}

/* Social Proof Feed \u2014 Activity Timeline */
section[data-sec="activityTimeline"]{display:none}
html.layout-social-proof-feed section[data-sec="activityTimeline"]{display:block}
.at-list{position:relative;margin-top:30px;max-width:640px}
.at-row{position:relative;display:grid;grid-template-columns:80px 26px 1fr;align-items:start;padding-bottom:24px}
.at-row:last-child{padding-bottom:0}
.at-time{font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:17px;color:var(--pipe,#1f7bb8);text-align:right;padding-right:14px;padding-top:1px;white-space:nowrap}
.at-rail{position:relative;display:flex;justify-content:center}
.at-rail::before{content:"";position:absolute;top:14px;bottom:-24px;left:50%;width:2px;background:var(--line,#e3e7ee);transform:translateX(-50%)}
.at-row:last-child .at-rail::before{display:none}
.at-dot{position:relative;z-index:1;width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:50%;background:#9aa3af;margin-top:4px;box-shadow:0 0 0 4px #fff}
.at-dot[data-status="completed"]{background:#21a366}
.at-dot[data-status="enroute"]{background:var(--pipe,#1f7bb8)}
.at-dot[data-status="booked"]{background:#f5b301}
.at-dot[data-status="active"]{background:var(--hivis,#ff7a00);animation:atpulse 1.9s ease-out infinite}
@keyframes atpulse{0%{box-shadow:0 0 0 4px #fff,0 0 0 6px rgba(255,122,0,.4)}70%{box-shadow:0 0 0 4px #fff,0 0 0 17px rgba(255,122,0,0)}100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 4px #fff,0 0 0 17px rgba(255,122,0,0)}}
.at-body{padding-left:14px;padding-top:0}
.at-task{font-family:"Barlow",sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:16px;color:var(--ink,#1a2230);line-height:1.2}
.at-row2{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:5px}
.at-meta{font-size:13px;color:#5b6470}
.at-pill{font-family:"Barlow",sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.05em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:2px 9px;border-radius:999px;background:#eef1f5;color:#5b6470}
.at-pill[data-status="completed"]{background:rgba(33,163,102,.14);color:#1c7a4d}
.at-pill[data-status="active"]{background:rgba(255,122,0,.16);color:#c25e00}
.at-pill[data-status="enroute"]{background:rgba(31,123,184,.14);color:#155a87}
.at-pill[data-status="booked"]{background:rgba(245,179,1,.2);color:#946a00}
/* Social Proof Feed \u2014 Customer Reactions */
section[data-sec="customerReactions"]{display:none}
html.layout-social-proof-feed section[data-sec="customerReactions"]{display:block}
.cr-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(290px,1fr));gap:20px;align-items:start;margin-top:30px}
.cr-card{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line,#e7e7e7);border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(20,30,45,.08)}
.cr-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px;padding:13px 15px}
.cr-card[data-style="google"] .cr-head,.cr-card[data-style="facebook"] .cr-head{border-bottom:1px solid #eef0f3}
.cr-ava{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:linear-gradient(140deg,var(--pipe,#1f7bb8),var(--pipe-deep,#155a87));color:#fff;font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:19px;flex:0 0 auto}
.cr-name{font-family:"Barlow",sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:14px;color:var(--ink,#1a2230);line-height:1.15}
.cr-sub{font-size:12px;color:#8a93a0;margin-top:1px}
.cr-brand{margin-left:auto;align-self:flex-start;font-family:"Barlow",sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.07em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#9aa3af}
.cr-body{padding:0 16px 16px}
.cr-card[data-style="google"] .cr-body,.cr-card[data-style="facebook"] .cr-body{padding-top:13px}
.cr-card[data-style="sms"] .cr-body,.cr-card[data-style="messenger"] .cr-body{padding-top:4px}
.cr-stars{color:#fbbf24;font-size:16px;letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:8px}
.cr-msg{font-size:15px;color:#2a3340;line-height:1.5}
.cr-bubble{display:inline-block;max-width:92%;padding:10px 14px;border-radius:18px;font-size:14.5px;line-height:1.45;background:#e9eaed;color:#1a2230;border-bottom-left-radius:5px}
.cr-card[data-style="messenger"] .cr-bubble{background:#0a7cff;color:#fff}
.cr-card[data-style="facebook"] .cr-bubble{background:#f0f2f5;color:#1a2230;border-radius:16px;max-width:100%;display:block}
.cr-time{font-size:11px;color:#9aa3af;margin-top:6px}
.cr-actions{font-family:"Barlow",sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:12px;color:#8a93a0;margin-top:9px}
.cr-img{width:100%;display:block}
.cr-imgph{aspect-ratio:3/4;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f1f3f6,#e3e7ee);color:#7c8694;font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;font-size:14px}

/* Social Proof Feed \u2014 Project Feed (Latest Work) */
section[data-sec="projectFeed"]{display:none}
html.layout-social-proof-feed section[data-sec="projectFeed"]{display:block}
.pf-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(240px,1fr));gap:20px;margin-top:30px}
.pf-card{appearance:none;text-align:left;border:1px solid var(--line,#e7e7e7);background:#fff;border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;padding:0;box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(20,30,45,.07);transition:transform .16s,box-shadow .16s;font:inherit;color:inherit}
.pf-card:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 18px 44px rgba(20,30,45,.14)}
.pf-shot{position:relative;aspect-ratio:1/1;overflow:hidden;background:var(--steel-900,#1a2230)}
.pf-img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;transition:transform .3s}
.pf-card:hover .pf-img{transform:scale(1.05)}
.pf-ph{width:100%;height:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f1f3f6,#e3e7ee);color:#7c8694;font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;font-size:14px}
.pf-zoom{position:absolute;right:10px;bottom:10px;background:rgba(10,14,20,.72);color:#fff;font-family:"Barlow",sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.05em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:999px;opacity:0;transform:translateY(4px);transition:opacity .16s,transform .16s}
.pf-card:hover .pf-zoom{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}
.pf-body{padding:14px 16px 16px}
.pf-title{font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:21px;line-height:1;margin:0;color:var(--ink,#1a2230)}
.pf-meta{font-family:"Barlow",sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.05em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#8a93a0;margin:7px 0 0}
.pf-lb{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:9999;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:24px}
.pf-lb.open{display:flex}
.pf-lb-backdrop{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(10,14,20,.72)}
.pf-lb-panel{position:relative;z-index:1;width:100%;max-width:880px;max-height:88vh;overflow:hidden;background:#fff;border-radius:18px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.15fr 1fr;box-shadow:0 30px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.4)}
.pf-lb-close{position:absolute;top:12px;right:14px;z-index:2;width:36px;height:36px;border:none;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(10,14,20,.55);color:#fff;font-size:22px;line-height:1;cursor:pointer}
.pf-lb-media{background:var(--steel-950,#0e131c);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:280px}

.sam-dot-in{fill:#fff}
.sam-dot-off{fill:#c3cad3}
.sam-lbl{font-family:"Barlow",sans-serif}
.sam-lbl.on{fill:var(--ink,#1d2430);font-weight:700;font-size:12.5px}
.sam-lbl.off{fill:#aeb6c0;font-weight:600;font-size:10.5px}
.sam-legend{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;margin-top:14px;padding:0 4px}
.sam-key{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font:600 13px/1 "Barlow",sans-serif;color:var(--ink-soft,#56606e)}
.sam-key-dot{width:11px;height:11px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--brand,#1f7a4d);box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(31,122,77,.16)}
.sam-count{font:700 12px/1 "Barlow",sans-serif;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--brand,#1f7a4d);background:var(--brand-tint,#eef6f1);padding:6px 11px;border-radius:999px}
.sam-extra{margin-top:14px;text-align:center;font-size:14px;color:var(--ink-soft,#56606e);line-height:1.5}
.sam-extra-lbl{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink,#1d2430)}

/* Tier 3: Emergency Availability Widget (reusable, ties hero) */
html.layout-quote-first main#top>[data-sec="emergencyAvailability"]{order:1;}
html.layout-photo-proof main#top>[data-sec="emergencyAvailability"]{order:1}
html.layout-emergency-response main#top>[data-sec="emergencyAvailability"]{order:1}
html.layout-authority-builder main#top>[data-sec="emergencyAvailability"]{order:1}
html.layout-service-area-dominator main#top>[data-sec="emergencyAvailability"]{order:1}
html.layout-reviews-first main#top>[data-sec="emergencyAvailability"]{order:1}
html.layout-premium-showcase main#top>[data-sec="emergencyAvailability"]{order:1}
html.layout-offer-funnel main#top>[data-sec="emergencyAvailability"]{order:1}
html.layout-ba-hero-slider main#top>[data-sec="emergencyAvailability"]{order:1}
html.layout-hero-image-slider main#top>[data-sec="emergencyAvailability"]{order:2}
html.layout-social-proof-feed main#top>[data-sec="emergencyAvailability"]{order:2}
.ea-section .wrap{max-width:760px}
.ea-head{font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:24px;text-align:center;margin:0 0 6px}
.ea-intro{text-align:center;color:var(--ink-soft,#56606e);margin:0 0 16px}
.ea-band{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line,#e7e7e7);border-radius:14px;padding:16px 20px;box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(20,30,45,.06)}
.ea-band.is-live{border-color:rgba(31,170,84,.45);background:#fff}
.ea-band.is-off{background:#fff;border-color:rgba(201,146,58,.4)}
.ea-dot{width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:50%;flex:0 0 auto;position:relative}
.ea-dot.live{background:#1faa54}
.ea-dot.live::after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:-6px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(31,170,84,.4);animation:ea-pulse 1.7s ease-out infinite}
.ea-dot.off{background:#dc2626}
@keyframes ea-pulse{0%{transform:scale(.55);opacity:.75}100%{transform:scale(1.7);opacity:0}}
.ea-text{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px;min-width:0}
.ea-label{font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:20px;line-height:1.1}
.ea-sub{font-size:14px;color:var(--ink-soft,#56606e);line-height:1.35}
.ea-cta{flex:0 0 auto;background:var(--hivis,#ff6a1f);color:#fff;font-family:"Barlow Condensed",sans-serif;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em;font-size:16px;padding:12px 24px;border-radius:10px;text-decoration:none;white-space:nowrap}
.ea-emerg{text-align:center;margin:12px 0 0;font-size:14px;color:var(--ink-soft,#56606e)}
@media(max-width:560px){.ea-band{flex-wrap:wrap}.ea-cta{width:100%;text-align:center}}

/* Review sources (platform trust signals) */
.rv-sources{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;justify-content:center;margin:6px 0 26px}
.rv-source{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line,#e7e7e7);border-radius:999px;padding:8px 16px 8px 8px;text-decoration:none;color:inherit;box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(20,30,45,.06)}
a.rv-source:hover{border-color:var(--brand,#1f7a4d)}
.rv-mono{width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:50%;flex:0 0 auto;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#fff;font-family:"Barlow",sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:14px}
.rv-logo{width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:6px;object-fit:contain;flex:0 0 auto}
.rv-pf{display:flex;flex-direction:column;line-height:1.15}
.rv-pf-n{font-family:"Barlow",sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:14px}
.rv-pf-r{font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-soft,#6a737f)}
.rv-foot{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:10px}
.rv-foot .who{margin-top:0}
.rv-src{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font:600 12px/1 "Barlow",sans-serif;color:var(--ink-soft,#6a737f)}
.rv-src .rv-mono{width:18px;height:18px;font-size:10px}.lp-ic{display:inline-block;width:1em;height:1em;vertical-align:-0.125em;stroke:currentColor;flex:none}.b-ic .lp-ic{width:17px;height:17px}.rc-ic .lp-ic{width:25px;height:25px}.svc .ic .lp-ic{width:27px;height:27px}.why-item .wic{height:50px;display:flex;align-items:center;color:var(--hivis);margin-bottom:2px}.why-item .wic .lp-ic{width:42px;height:42px;stroke-width:1.75}
</style>
<script src="/icons.js"></script>

<script>
/* ============================================================
   ANALYTICS HOOKS — same contract as the broker template, so
   both feed one events table in the platform.
   ============================================================ */
window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
function trackEvent(name, props = {}){
  const payload = { event:name, site:SITE_CONFIG.business, ts:Date.now(), ...props };
  window.dataLayer.push(payload);
  console.log("[track]", payload);
  fetch('/api/events', {
    method:'POST',
    headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},
    body: JSON.stringify({ site:SITE_CONFIG.business, siteId:SITE_CONFIG.siteId, slug:SITE_CONFIG.slug, event:name, props:{ ...props, ts:Date.now() } }),
    keepalive:true             // call_click is the money metric — fire it even as the dialer opens
  }).catch(()=>{});
}

/* click-to-call: wire every tel link + log it (this is the money metric) */
(function wirePhones(){
  const tel = "tel:" + SITE_CONFIG.phone;
  ["emergCall","navPhone","headCall","heroCall","areaCall","formCall","footPhone","mobileCall"].forEach(id=>{
    const el = document.getElementById(id); if(!el) return;
    if(el.tagName==="A" && !(id==="heroCall" && SITE_CONFIG.sections && SITE_CONFIG.sections.hero && SITE_CONFIG.sections.hero.callAction==="link") && !(id==="headCall" && SITE_CONFIG.sections && SITE_CONFIG.sections.header && SITE_CONFIG.sections.header.action==="form")) el.href = tel;
    el.addEventListener("click",()=>trackEvent("call_click",{location:id}));
  });
})();

/* quote submit stub */
async function submitLead(){
  const g = id => document.getElementById(id);
  const data = { name:g('name').value.trim(), phone:g('phone').value.trim(), job:g('job').value,
                 suburb:g('suburb').value.trim(), detail:g('detail').value.trim() };
  if(!data.name || !data.phone){ alert("Please add your name and phone so we can call you back."); return; }
  trackEvent("lead_submit",{ job:data.job, suburb:data.suburb });
  try {
    const res = await fetch('/api/leads', {
      method:'POST',
      headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},
      body: JSON.stringify({
        site: SITE_CONFIG.business,
        siteId: SITE_CONFIG.siteId,
        slug: SITE_CONFIG.slug,
        kind: "trade",
        name: data.name,
        email: null,
        phone: data.phone,
        details: { job:data.job, suburb:data.suburb, detail:data.detail }
      })
    });
    if(!res.ok) console.error("Lead save failed:", res.status, await res.text());
  } catch(e){ console.error("Lead save error:", e); }
  // Always thank the customer so a backend hiccup never bounces a real lead.
  document.getElementById("quoteForm").style.display="none";
  document.getElementById("quoteSuccess").classList.add("show");
}

trackEvent("page_view",{ page:"trade_landing", trade:SITE_CONFIG.trade });
</script>
